instructions: groot is a Bun-only TypeScript monorepo: flag any use of npm, npx, yarn, or pnpm as commands that groot's code, scripts, docs, or generated output instruct people to RUN. Exception: naming those tools while documenting third-party/upstream behavior, quoting their error output verbatim, or explaining compatibility quirks is correct and required for accuracy — do not flag it (the sanctioned npm registry-administration steps in docs/maintainers.md are likewise exempt). Treat .github/workflows/*, install.sh, install.ps1, and scripts/* as security-critical: flag unpinned GitHub Actions (must be full 40-char commit SHAs with version comments), overly broad workflow permissions, shell or PowerShell injection risks, downloads without checksum verification, and any secret exposure. Docs may describe commands that are not implemented yet when they are clearly marked as planned — do not penalize that.
